title: Verify the 'Set a Reminder' happy path flow for an eligible user
description: Tests that a user who has not watched content within 5 mins of trial activation can navigate to the Trial Corner, enable the 'Remind me' toggle, and see a confirmation.
preconditions: User has an active ₹1 trial, started more than 5 minutes ago.
User has not consumed any content.
User is part of the 'Trial Corner' experiment cohort.

steps.description: 2. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget on the homepage.
3. Click the widget to navigate to the 'Trial Corner' Hub.
5. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'.
6. Verify a confirmation message is displayed (e.g., 'Reminder set!').

expected_result: The 'Remind me' toggle should be in the 'on' state. The system should schedule a WhatsApp/Push notification for 24 hours before the trial's expiration. The `remind-me-clicked` event with `page source` as `trial corner` should be triggered.
